content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1548: Great Shock

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Cornet and the Heavenly Eye Clan fellows watched Jia Ni kill the others in horror. In several minutes, she had finished murdering Hong Fei and the warriors of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe.

All the members of the Heavenly Eye Clan gathered in this area kept their mouths shut. No one dared to make a sound.

The Fiery Phoenix Tribe was an extremely large force among the forces under the Mysterious Sky Clan’s protection. Compared to the Heavenly Eye Clan, they were much more tremendous.

However, even though they were a powerful force, Chauncey at the Territory Ancestor Realm was killed quickly and met the same result as his fellows.

This shocked the entire Heavenly Eye Clan!

Cornet and Yvelines were filled with fear. They shivered when they looked at the ravine.

They all heard Zi Yao’s advice and Jia Ni address her as “Master.” Zi Yao was Jia Ni’s master?

As Jia Ni was the strongest expert of the Secret Pattern Tribe and Judy’s best friend, her reputation was well-known in the entire Sea Domain of Nihility. Her realm was high, her identity was noble, and she was even stronger than Chauncey. She now had a Master?

Who could become her master?

Cornet looked at Yvelines with the hope of receiving an explanation from him. Yvelines just gave a bitter smile and shook his head.

“Gosh. Chauncey and the members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe were all killed here. We... What should we do? Once the experts of the Mysterious Sky Clan find out about this, they won’t forgive us,” sighed an elder of the Heavenly Eye Clan. He thought the sky was about to fall on their heads.

Cornet maliciously threw him a glance to signal him to shut up. Then, he stood with Yvelines by Jia Ni and looked at her.

The corpses of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe warriors hadn’t cooled yet. Jia Ni stood by those corpses and wore a cold and sinister smile. “You guys can tell Judy or Han Tian that I killed Chauncey and the Fiery Phoenix Tribe warriors. Judy and Han Tian can come find me to talk.”

The Heavenly Eye Clan was shaken because of her words.

Han Tian? Judy?

They were the two Territory Ancestor of the Mysterious Sky Clan, the characters with top power. After they became a dependent force of the Mysterious Sky Clan, they didn’t have a chance to see these two Territory Ancestors. The high-echelon experts of the Mysterious Sky Clan that Cornet used to meet were Tu Shi Qi and Ya Yun.

They thought that Judy and Han Tian were at the peak of the pyramid, the legendary existences that they couldn’t meet.

“My Master said that they wanted to stay here for a while. Yeah, if you can contact the Mysterious Sky Clan, you can tell Judy and Han Tian about this and ask them to come here,” Jia Ni said with a cold, natural face. “If they know, they will come personally. Don’t worry. They won’t trouble your Heavenly Eye Clan.”

Then, Jia Ni left. She pierced through the barrier sealing the ravine and disappeared.

“Yvelines, you... how do you know those fierce experts? Why didn’t you tell us earlier?” said Cornet through his gritted teeth.

The elders of the Heavenly Eye Clan gathered and asked Yvelines, Adams, and Masha. They wanted to know Shi Yan’s and Zi Yao’s identity and the real situation.

Little Ya held the flaming crystal. She was stimulated but she didn’t know the reason. She looked at the ravine and said thanks from the bottom of her heart.

Now she knew how precious this little crystal was. Even the Patriarch Chauncey had come for it. She was thrilled as she got such a treasure.

“Chief! The fire seal the Fiery Phoenix Tribe had set up is broken!”

A young man of the Heavenly Eye Clan ran to them excitedly to tell them the updated situation.

Cornet nodded, pondered, and spoke to Yvelines, “Contact the Mysterious Sky Clan and tell them the details. I hope, I hope it what Jia Ni had said will happen and the Mysterious Sky Clan won’t blame us.”

Everybody felt safe unknowingly. Jia Ni was strong enough to talk to Han Tian and Judy. Moreover, her mysterious “Master” could make Han Tian and Judy neglect Chauncey’s death, which prevented them from punishing the Heavenly Eye Clan.

————————————

Inside the ravine, Shi Yan still closed his eyes to cultivate to filter and refine Neptune’s and the others’ soul altars and energy.

At this moment, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was moving deep inside his soul. Waves of fierce energy emitted from the tower.

So many mysterious Absolute Beginning symbols were glowing on that Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. Shi Yan was using energy taken from Neptune and the others to refine a new Original Symbol.

Thus, it took him more time for this cultivation session.

Beautiful Zi Yao was sitting on seven-colored crystal throne and using her power to refine Chauncey. At this moment, she opened her eyes to look at Jia Ni and say. “Well done.”

Jia Ni bowed to her slightly, her face sour. “Thank you for your compliment, Master.”

Squinting, Zi Yao said indifferently, “You feel discontent as you have to serve me even though you have the Territory Ancestor Realm, don’t you? Hmm, before I lost my power, I was at Third Sky of Territory Ancestor. I was about to reach the ultimate realm. It’s good for your power Upanishad comprehension to follow me. You have to know that: I could have given you to Shi Yan so he could have swallowed you and Xiao Lie altogether.”

Jia Ni changed her visage and screamed. “Please forgive me, Master!”

“Serve me well and I won’t mistreat you. I will teach you the real power of your power Upanishad. I will help your Secret Incantation technique advance,” said Zi Yao calmly.

“You know Secret Incantation too?” Jia Ni’s eyes brightened.

“The mysterious incantations in the world share some features. The Secret Incantation is also a technique involving curses and incantations. The Secret Incantation uses your natural drawings on your body as the conductor. It’s awesome, isn’t it?” Zi Yao smiled coldly, “My body also has natural patterns that are more powerful and mysterious than yours. Thus, my knowledge of incantations is better than yours, for sure.”

Jia Ni was moved and she asked respectfully, “Master, please teach me.”

“Yeah, it sounds nice to my ears.” Zi Yao nodded. “I kept you and Xiao Lie because your blood is suitable for me to carve my soul imprint. It’s your opportunity. Don’t think of it as a bad accident. Neptune had the worst accident.

“I understood,” Jia Ni replied happily.

—————————————-

Mysterious Sky Clan.

Forefather Dragon Lizard dashed to a mountain that pierced through the sky. He steadied in the hall of an imposing palace and hissed, “Dragon Lizard, ask to see Forefather Han Tian!”

BOOM!

A loud explosion came from the mountain peak, which shook the big mountain. After a while, Han Tian walked out from one of those majestic palaces. He smiled cheerfully, his face glowing in good health. “Congratulations. Finally, you’ve reached the Territory Ancestor Realm. It seems that you’ve cultivated hard.”

Then, seeing Forefather Dragon Lizard, Han Tian’s face darkened. “You got hurt?”

He saw dry bloodstains on Forefather Dragon Lizard’s body and felt his strange conditions.

“Yuan Zu almost killed me,” Forefather Dragon Lizard had dark eyes. “Right in Wavy River Star Area. Yuan Zu is an Absolute Beginning creature called Yuan. He has an extremely profound realm and he is utterly cunning and sinister...”

Forefather Dragon Lizard briefed the situation. “As I found it dangerous to stay there, I had to run away. I don’t know what happened afterward.”

“Yuan Zu...”

Han Tian pulled a stern face. Taking a deep breath, he said, “He’s the oldest among us. Many of us have guessed that he’s from the previous era, but we weren’t so sure. Turns out it’s so...”

Han Tian and Dragon Lizard discussed some secrets of that battle. Then, Han Tian ordered his subordinates to gather information. He wanted to know what had happened in Wavy River Star Area.

Shortly after, Judy returned. She came to see Han Tian and Dragon Lizard with a serious countenance.

“I come with breaking news,” Judy talked to Han Tian, Dragon Lizard, and some important officers of the Mysterious Sky Clan. “Yuan Zu and Shi Yan fought in Wavy River Star Area. They had almost reduced the entire territory to dust. They had cracked many territory barriers there. Yuan Zu ran away. Shi Yan and his woman disappeared. Neptune, Xiao Lie, and Jia Ni went missing. No one knows where they are.”

“Shi Yan and Yuan Zu had a great fight?” Han Tian couldn’t understand it. “He could fight Yuan Zu? Yuan Zu is at Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm!”

“It’s true. I don’t understand why Shi Yan suddenly became so fierce,” said Judy with a forced smile.

“Strange. It’s really strange. It should be something else. Unfortunately, all the participants are missing. We don’t know the actual situation,” Han Tian got a headache.

While they were bewildered, Tu Shi Qi and Ya Yun came quickly. Tu Shi Qi flew fast and shouted from a distance, his face strangely worried. “The Heavenly Eye Clan sent important news!”

“Heavenly Eye Clan?” Han Tian looked puzzled.

“A small race that depends on us. Tu Shi Qi wanted to give Shi Yan face so we’ve accepted them. At this moment, the Fiery Phoenix Tribe controls them. We rarely ask about their situations,” said an elder.

Since he knew that Han Tian wouldn’t mind a small clan like the Heavenly Eye Clan, he had to provide more details.

“What’s the news?” Judy asked coldly.

“Shi Yan and Jia Ni are in Musing Rain Star Area of the Heavenly Eye Clan. They’re in the holy land of the Heavenly Eye Clan. And the woman is called Zi Yao. She killed Chauncey and Jia Ni killed the members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe who paid the Heavenly Eye Clan a visit. Jia Ni told the Heavenly Eye Clan to tell us that she wants to meet Forefather Han Tian and Judy in Heavenly Eye Clan’s land.”

Tu Shi Qi panted and told Han Tian and Judy the information he had just got.

Han Tian and Judy exchanged looks. They nodded and then said in unison, “Good!”

Immediately, they wanted to go to the Heavenly Eye Clan.

“I also want to go there,” said Forefather Dragon Lizard.

“Yeah, we should go together. We will use the teleport formation leading to the Heavenly Eye Clan. Although it will consume a lot of energy to cross the star areas, it’s just energy. We shouldn’t care about energy too much.” Judy was resolute. While talking, she headed towards the teleport formation.

At Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, as long as they knew the direction, it wasn’t difficult to teleport through star areas.

Han Tian, Dragon Lizard, Tu Shi Qi and his wife followed her. They had teleported altogether with a group of experts to the Heavenly Eye Clan’s land.
